mapper.update: UPDATE biz_dish t SET t.score = ( SELECT ifnull( avg( c.score ), 0 ) FROM biz_dish_comment c WHERE c.dish_id = t.id and c.status IN (1, 2)), t.comment_size = ( SELECT ifnull( count( * ), 0 ) FROM biz_dish_comment c WHERE c.dish_id = t.id and c.status IN (1, 2))
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM biz_dish ORDER BY view_size DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM biz_dish ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 10
